name: Chicken with Fruit and Almonds
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Damson plum jam or preserves
recipeInstructions:
Breast pieces should be 4 ounces, skinless, boneless, and cut into 1-inch pieces.
1. Combine milk and coconut in a saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then remove from heat and let stand for 30 minutes. Drain well, reserving the milk. Press the grated coconut between paper towels to remove excess moisture, then set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine onions with the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, lemon rind, damson plum jam or preserves, coriander, sugar, salt, anise seeds, ginger, saffron, and chili powder). Stir well until combined.
3. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook until butter melts. Add the reserved coconut; cook until lightly browned, stirring constantly. Remove the coconut using a slotted spoon, set aside.
4. Add chicken to the hot oil in the skillet. Cook until lightly browned, stirring occasionally. Add the onion mixture. Stir gently.
5. Stir in the reserved milk, coconut, and almonds. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 10 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice.
